.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 9 to match the project's target runtime.
.github/workflows/maven.yml.why_exists: The project has been migrated to JDK 17; running tests or builds with JDK 9 will fail due to missing APIs or bytecode incompatibility.
.github/workflows/maven.yml.before:
name: Set up JDK 1.9
  uses: actions/setup-java@v1
  with:
    java-version: 9
.github/workflows/maven.yml.after:
name: Set up JDK 17
  uses: actions/setup-java@v1
  with:
    java-version: 17

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Add steps to generate and commit JaCoCo coverage badges automatically.
.github/workflows/maven.yml.after:
- name: Generate JaCoCo Badge
  uses: cicirello/jacoco-badge-generator@v2
  with:
    generate-branches-badge: true

- name: Commit the badge (if it changed)
  run: |
    if [[ `git status --porcelain` ]]; then
      git config --global user.name 'Github workflow'
      git config --global user.email 'nowhere@gmail.com'
      git add -A
      git commit -m "Autogenerated JaCoCo coverage badge"
      git push
    fi

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Add step to upload JaCoCo coverage report as a build artifact.
.github/workflows/maven.yml.after:
- name: Upload JaCoCo coverage report
  uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
  with:
    name: jacoco-report
    path: target/site/jacoco/

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the logs directory to .gitignore to exclude application log files from version control.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the base Docker image from OpenJDK 15 to OpenJDK 17 to align with the target JDK version.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Running a JDK 17 application on a JDK 15 base image may cause runtime compatibility issues or fail to leverage JDK 17 features; ensures the container runtime matches the build target.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the exposed port from 8099 to 9080 to match the application's configured server port.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.3.x does not support JDK 17; the build will fail with compilation errors or runtime incompatibilities due to internal API changes in JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The compiler plugin configuration relies on this property; without updating it, the project would still target JDK 11, failing to utilize JDK 17 features or potentially causing mismatched bytecode issues if other dependencies require 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade MapStruct version to a release compatible with JDK 17 and Lombok.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older MapStruct versions may have compatibility issues with JDK 17's stricter module system or annotation processing changes, leading to compilation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Lombok 1.18.10 has known bugs and compatibility issues with JDK 17, causing annotation processing failures or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Testcontainers PostgreSQL module to a version compatible with JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Testcontainers versions may fail to run or connect properly on JDK 17 due to underlying Docker client or Java API incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Reorder annotation processor paths to ensure Lombok processes before MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: MapStruct requires Lombok to have already processed the classes to see the generated getters/setters; incorrect ordering causes MapStruct compilation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage reporting.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Add a new endpoint to retrieve articles filtered by location (country and city).
Remove a deprecated method that was marked for deletion.
Change the mapping path of the paged articles endpoint to avoid conflict with the new root GET endpoint.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Refactor the article data transfer object to use a dedicated LocationDto instead of a raw String for location data.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Add import for java.util.List to support the new method return type.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol class List

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Extend ArticleRepositoryCustom interface to include custom query methods.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol class ArticleRepositoryCustom
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.before: public interface ArticleRepository extends PagingAndSortingRepository<Article, Long> {
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.after: public interface ArticleRepository extends PagingAndSortingRepository<Article, Long>, ArticleRepositoryCustom {

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Add method declaration for searching articles by country and city.
Refactor the JSONB column to use a dedicated type instead of a raw String.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/se.general_idea: Add import for java.util.List to support the new method return type.
Add new method signature to the service interface for searching articles by location.

src/test/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/Sp.general_idea: Update test imports to use the new LocationDto class instead of raw JSON strings.
src/test/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/Sp.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol LocationDto or method setLocation/getLocation if import is missing or types are mismatched.

src/test/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/Sp.general_idea: Replace raw JSON string assignment with structured LocationDto object in test setup.

src/test/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/Sp.general_idea: Update assertion to check the structured LocationDto field instead of the raw JSON string field.
src/test/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/Sp.why_exists: Compile error: method getJsonData() no longer exists or is incompatible with the new DTO structure.
